# openclaw-best-practices

Agent-facing context for the openclaw-best-practices repo.

Canonical full context: ./llms-full.txt

## Included files

- `AGENTS.md`: Agent operating guide. Bootstrap instructions and repo-specific operating rules.
- `README.md`: README. High-level project overview and usage notes.
- `configuration/multi-model-orchestration.md`: Multi model orchestration. Supporting project documentation.
- `security/agent-security-hardening.md`: Agent security hardening. Supporting project documentation.
- `workflows/sub-agent-patterns.md`: Sub agent patterns. Supporting project documentation.
- `workflows/session-management.md`: Session management. Supporting project documentation.
- `workflows/cross-lane-handoffs.md`: Cross lane handoffs. Structured task-state handoffs between agent lanes.
- `workflows/design-contracts.md`: DESIGN.md frontend contracts. How to use DESIGN.md and templates as the visual contract for frontend work.

Generated by `scripts/build-llms.py` from `llms-config.json`.
